raw_consumer_statement: I was suppose to have a delivery on XX/XX/XXXX from Best Buy they used ups for the delivery service. They say before delivery on XX/XX/XXXX I got an email saying my items would be delivered XX/XX/XXXX between XXXX and XXXX since these items were very expensive I wanted to make sure I was going to be home and I typically didnt make it home until XXXX so I called ups to see if I could re schedule the delivery time and explained I wouldnt be home until XXXX they told me that It would be fine that the items would arrive around that time and that if no one was home to sign for them they would bring them back to the warehouse. The next day at XXXX and e-mail was sent that these items were marked as delivered I wasnt able to see the email until XXXX because I was working. When I got home around XXXX i didnt see any items so I thought well they brought them to the warehouse like the said I contacted ups directly after submitting online I hadnt received the packages because I waited a little bit longer to see if they would bring them back by. I was informed by the ups agent that they had my packages and I had to contact Best Buy. I contacted bestbuy and I kept getting that they were investigating and then that I would be getting a refund because they couldnt locate my packages. I received one refund for the one time but not the second item that was with it. I contacted ups and Best Buy multiple times finally ups called Best Buy with me and said they sent over claim paperwork the Best Buy agent said that they would refund me. I never received a refund finally a corporate worker named XXXX from Best Buy contacted me after I made a report against them through the better business bureau and he informed me they wouldnt be refunding me and that I would have to contact my local law enforcement. Which I had already given them A police report. I contacted ups in hopes since this mess started with them they would help unfortunately they said they are in contract with Best Buy and wont refund me I have to go through Best Buy. Which I tried and they are refusing to refund me. I never received my product and ups is trying to refund me bust Best Buy isnt doing their part and its been XXXX months I submitted all of this information to the credit card company as well in hopes they would do a charge back or dispute and the have denied me even though ups informed them of the issue as well.
